.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java convention (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL string concatenation to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into one line.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH constant to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line break in string assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH constant to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line break in string assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword in null check to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword in mkdirs check to comply with standard code style.
Reformatted the Authenticator anonymous class instantiation for better readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for new Authenticator() block.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the generated version comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers in the startup message.
Refactor the startup log message to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Inject CRLF_SAFE_MARKER into the log call to prevent CRLF injection vulnerabilities in log output.
Update profile logging logic to display default profiles if no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or improve readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" in logger.error format string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Remove explicit registration of Zalando Problem modules, likely because they are now auto-configured or no longer needed in the updated framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reordered method parameters to align with updated Spring Boot Liquibase configuration conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider<DataSource> liquibaseDataSource after LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replaced deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to match Spring Boot 3.x Liquibase integration API.
Refactor SecurityConfiguration from extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to using @Configuration with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ deprecations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in newer Spring Security versions.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() for modern Spring Security configuration.
Replace deprecated header configuration methods (featurePolicy, frameOptions.deny) with modern lambda-based headers configuration and permissionsPolicy.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicitly set CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix compatibility issues in newer Spring Security.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport entry point with standard HttpStatusEntryPoint for API requests to align with modern Spring Security exception handling.
Replace custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler/FailureHandler and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler with standard HttpStatus-based handlers for cleaner API responses.
Add SpaWebFilter to handle SPA-specific security requirements, replacing or supplementing previous CORS/CSRF filter logic.
Add CookieCsrfFilter to handle CSRF token management via cookies, replacing manual CsrfFilter injection.
Remove the configure(WebSecurity web) method as static resource ignoring is now handled via requestMatchers in the SecurityFilterChain.
Move Content Security Policy directives from hardcoded string to JHipsterProperties configuration for better maintainability.
Add explicit security rule for /v3/api-docs/** endpoints to restrict access to admins, likely due to OpenAPI 3.0 migration.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the redundant 'app' subdirectory path in favor of the root static directory.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced generic path patterns like "/app/*" with specific extension patterns like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted wildcards for content and i18n.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of legacy Swagger 2 endpoints.
